deadline_notes: Biennial. Birth year determines active cycle: even birth year → Dec 31, 2026 ACTIVE; odd birth year → Dec 31, 2027.
notes: Staggered by birth year (not license number). 50% self-study cap (40hr max). 16hr personal development cap. CPE reporting via Certemy by January 31. June 30 permit renewal. No carryover.
